title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Knight Frank India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Knight Frank India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Knight Frank India in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Knight Frank India:
Knight Frank India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Knight Frank India!
